user.title: Connect to AionFlux
user.description: Enter your AionFlux API URL and API key. Generate a key in AionFlux → Settings → Integrations.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the AionFlux API. Check the URL.
error.ssl_error: SSL error. Make sure the API URL starts with https://
error.timeout: Connection timed out. Check the API URL and your network.

abort.already_configured: AionFlux is already configured for this API URL.
